title: 2026年6月13日星期六RELO北京英语教学研讨会
text:
Title: 2026年6月13日星期六RELO北京英语教学研讨会
Source: 美国驻华大使馆
Published at: 2026-06-08T10:30:00.000Z
Source URL: https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MjM5MDA2NDk0MA==&mid=2651346254&idx=4&sn=de423947b41a83c6da14191222b12f04
Expected action: exclude
Rationale: Beijing event limited to working English teachers, researchers, and English-major students.
Review/exclusion reasons: not_general_public
This case is retained as a negative product judgment. The original article content is not mirrored in the public repository.
